headline: Viettel High Tech Accelerates 6G Architecture Leadership through Strategic Global Alliances at MWC 2026
summary: Viettel High Tech, the advanced technology arm of Viettel Group, today announced the establishment of strategic collaborations with Intel, AMD and ID Quantique at Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026, while formally joining the global 6G alliance initiated by Qualcomm. These agreements mark a strategic milestone in Viettel High Tech's evolution from a large-scale 5G research, development and deployment leader to a co-architect of the global 6G architecture and technology roadmap.

content.title: Viettel High Tech Accelerates 6G Architecture Leadership through Strategic Global Alliances at MWC 2026
content.summary: Viettel High Tech, the advanced technology arm of Viettel Group, today announced the establishment of strategic collaborations with Intel, AMD and ID Quantique at Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026, while formally joining the global 6G alliance initiated by Qualcomm. These agreements mark a strategic milestone in Viettel High Tech's evolution from a large-scale 5G research, development and deployment leader to a co-architect of the global 6G architecture and technology roadmap.

thumbnail.caption: The collaboration focuses on joint development and validation of key 5G Advanced and 6G technologies.
